voice_observations.caption_text:
𝐒𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄, 𝐎𝐍𝐄 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 𝐀𝐓 𝐀 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄 💌
This Mother’s Day, we handed out love notes in honor of all the amazing mothers and captured the heartfelt reactions as people read the messages. 🥰

Because sometimes, a few kind words are all it takes to brighten someone’s day. 💖
�#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️ ��#FitnessFirstMe #AboveAndBeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #MothersDay
voice_observations.voiceover_text: I feel it in the air Slipping through my fingers all the time I try to capture every minute The feeling in it Slipping through my fingers all the time Do I really see what's in her mind? Each time I think I'm close to knowing She keeps on growing Slipping through my fingers all the time Sleep in our eyes, her and me At the breakfast table Barely awake
notable_phrases: This Mother’s Day, we handed out love notes in honor of all the amazing mothers and captured the heartfelt reactions as people read the messages
Because sometimes, a few kind words are all it takes to brighten someone’s day
voice_observations.hook_text: SPREADING LOVE, ONE NOTE AT A TIME
